programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: US documentary series. Mike and Frank find a vast junkyard where Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe, and a large collection of rare motorbikes is found.

programs.title: Ice Road Truckers
programs.desc: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain.

programs.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programs.desc: Oscar-winning sci-fi action film sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programs.desc: Action from the top division of French football, featuring Nantes v Marseille, PSG v Lorient, Metz v Monaco, Nice v Lens, Lille v Le Havre and Lyon v Rennes.
